args: Delegate toolkit update check to 'shll check-updates --json --released' (rework internal/updatecheck into a thin exec caller, delete manifest-fetch + brew-join + threshold code), add POST /api/updates/check on-demand endpoint, extend SSE update-available payload to full per-tool verdicts, rework palette: add 'Check for Updates' + 'Check for Updates (incl. patches)' with toast reporting, keep 'Update Now' as the single update action, delete the qualifying-gated 'Update to v{X}' entry and updateActionLabel
